requirement_topic.en: SDPPI Mandatory Type Approval (Sertifikasi Perangkat Telekomunikasi)
requirement_topic.zh: SDPPI强制型号认证（Sertifikasi Perangkat Telekomunikasi）
requirement_topic.zht: SDPPI強制型號認證（Sertifikasi Perangkat Telekomunikasi）

summary.en: All telecommunications and radio devices imported into or sold in Indonesia must obtain mandatory type approval (sertifikasi perangkat telekomunikasi) from SDPPI (Directorate General of Resources and Equipment for Post and Information Technology) under KOMINFO before importation or sale. The requirement covers Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT, and any device operating in licensed or unlicensed radio frequency bands. Type approval testing must be conducted at SDPPI-accredited laboratories in Indonesia or overseas testing facilities recognised by SDPPI. Upon approval, SDPPI issues a unique certification number that must be displayed in a red-bordered box on the device label and outer packaging. For cellular devices, IMEI registration is additionally required under PM Kominfo No. 1 of 2020. Devices without a valid SDPPI certification number will be detained by Indonesian customs (DJBC — Direktorat Jenderal Bea dan Cukai). There is no mutual recognition agreement (MRA) between Indonesia and CE (EU), FCC (US), or any other major economy. Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, CCC, and CE certifications are not recognised and do not substitute for SDPPI type approval.
summary.zh: 所有进口至印度尼西亚或在印度尼西亚销售的电信及无线设备，须在进口或销售前取得KOMINFO下属SDPPI（邮政与信息技术资源及设备总局）颁发的强制型号认证（sertifikasi perangkat telekomunikasi）。该要求涵盖Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、物联网及任何在授权或非授权无线频段运行的设备。型号认证测试须在SDPPI认可的印度尼西亚国内实验室或SDPPI承认的境外测试机构进行。获批后，SDPPI颁发唯一认证编号，须以红框形式显示在设备标签及外包装上。对于蜂窝设备，依据2020年第1号KOMINFO部长令，还须进行IMEI注册。未持有有效SDPPI认证编号的设备将被印度尼西亚海关（DJBC）扣押。印度尼西亚与CE（欧盟）、FCC（美国）或其他主要经济体之间不存在相互认可协定（MRA）。中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可、CCC及CE认证均不被承认，不能替代SDPPI型号认证。
summary.zht: 所有進口至印度尼西亞或在印度尼西亞銷售的電信及無線設備，須在進口或銷售前取得KOMINFO下屬SDPPI（郵政與資訊技術資源及設備總局）頒發的強制型號認證（sertifikasi perangkat telekomunikasi）。該要求涵蓋Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、物聯網及任何在授權或非授權無線頻段運行的設備。型號認證測試須在SDPPI認可的印度尼西亞國內實驗室或SDPPI承認的境外測試機構進行。獲批後，SDPPI頒發唯一認證編號，須以紅框形式顯示在設備標籤及外包裝上。對於蜂窩設備，依據2020年第1號KOMINFO部長令，還須進行IMEI註冊。未持有有效SDPPI認證編號的設備將被印度尼西亞海關（DJBC）扣押。印度尼西亞與CE（歐盟）、FCC（美國）或其他主要經濟體之間不存在相互認可協定（MRA）。中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可、CCC及CE認證均不被承認，不能替代SDPPI型號認證。

standards_or_laws: Undang-Undang No. 36 Tahun 1999 tentang Telekomunikasi (Telecommunications Law No. 36 of 1999)
Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 16 Tahun 2018 tentang Ketentuan Operasional Sertifikasi Perangkat Telekomunikasi (Operational Provisions for Telecommunications Device Certification)

Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 1 Tahun 2020 tentang Pengendalian Alat dan/atau Perangkat Telekomunikasi yang Tersambung ke Jaringan Bergerak Seluler melalui IMEI (IMEI registration for cellular devices)
Peraturan Pemerintah No. 52 Tahun 2000 tentang Penyelenggaraan Telekomunikasi (Government Regulation No. 52 of 2000 on Telecommunications)

summary.en: For wireless devices exported from China, the domestic certification chain includes: (1) SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval issued by MIIT for devices using radio frequencies; (2) MIIT Network Access License (NAL / jin wang xu ke zheng) for terminal equipment connecting to public telecommunications networks; (3) CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA for products within mandatory CCC scope. Chinese manufacturers hold test reports to GB standards (GB 9254 / GB/T 9254 for EMC; GB 4943.1 for safety) from CNAS-accredited laboratories. None of these Chinese approvals are recognised by Indonesian SDPPI.
summary.zh: 从中国出口的无线设备，国内认证链包括：（1）MIIT颁发的无线电型号核准（SRRC）；（2）适用于接入公共电信网络终端设备的MIIT进网许可证（NAL）；（3）CNCA主管的中国强制认证（CCC）（适用于在强制认证范围内的产品）。中国制造商持有CNAS认可实验室出具的GB标准测试报告（EMC适用GB/T 9254；安全适用GB 4943.1）。上述中国认证均不被印度尼西亚SDPPI承认。
summary.zht: 從中國出口的無線設備，國內認證鏈包括：（1）MIIT頒發的無線電型號核准（SRRC）；（2）適用於接入公共電信網路終端設備的MIIT進網許可證（NAL）；（3）CNCA主管的中國強制認證（CCC）（適用於在強制認證範圍內的產品）。中國製造商持有CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB標準測試報告（EMC適用GB/T 9254；安全適用GB 4943.1）。上述中國認證均不被印度尼西亞SDPPI承認。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval — MIIT / State Radio Regulation of China (SRRC, under Telecommunications Regulations of PRC)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) — YD/T terminal equipment standards
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA / GB 4943.1 safety; GB/T 9254 EMC
GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment EMC (aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 60950-1)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC certifications provide zero exemption from Indonesia's mandatory SDPPI type approval (sertifikasi perangkat). A full, separate Indonesian certification is required for every device model. No MRA exists between China and Indonesia for telecommunications device approval. SDPPI-accredited laboratory testing against Indonesian SNI and persyaratan teknis requirements is required. Cellular devices additionally require IMEI registration under PM Kominfo No. 1 of 2020. Common exporter error: submitting Chinese SRRC or EU CE certificates to DJBC — customs will detain shipments without a valid SDPPI certificate number on the label.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可及CCC认证对印度尼西亚强制SDPPI型号认证（sertifikasi perangkat）不提供任何豁免。每款设备型号均须单独完成印度尼西亚认证。中国与印度尼西亚之间不存在电信设备认证相互认可协定。须在SDPPI认可实验室针对印度尼西亚SNI及persyaratan teknis要求进行测试。蜂窝设备还须依据2020年第1号KOMINFO部长令进行IMEI注册。常见出口商错误：向DJBC提交中国SRRC或欧盟CE证书——标签上无有效SDPPI认证编号的货物将被扣押。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可及CCC認證對印度尼西亞強制SDPPI型號認證（sertifikasi perangkat）不提供任何豁免。每款設備型號均須單獨完成印度尼西亞認證。中國與印度尼西亞之間不存在電信設備認證相互認可協定。須在SDPPI認可實驗室針對印度尼西亞SNI及persyaratan teknis要求進行測試。蜂窩設備還須依據2020年第1號KOMINFO部長令進行IMEI註冊。常見出口商錯誤：向DJBC提交中國SRRC或歐盟CE證書——標籤上無有效SDPPI認證編號的貨物將被扣押。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — sertifikasi perangkat telekomunikasi from SDPPI required for all wireless and telecom devices before importation or sale in Indonesia; no equivalence with CE, FCC, SRRC, or CCC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all radio-frequency devices; MIIT NAL for terminal equipment connecting to public networks; CCC for applicable product categories under CNCA; GB standards compliance required

source.publisher: SDPPI (Ditjen Sumber Daya dan Perangkat Pos dan Informatika) — KOMINFO Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SDPPI type approval (sertifikasi perangkat) is mandatory for all wireless and telecommunications devices before import into or sale in Indonesia. No equivalence exists with CE, FCC, Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, or CCC certifications. SDPPI-accredited laboratory testing is required for every device model. IMEI registration applies additionally to all cellular devices. Devices without a valid SDPPI certificate number displayed in a red-bordered box on the label will be detained by DJBC at Indonesian customs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SDPPI型号认证（sertifikasi perangkat）是所有无线及电信设备进口至印度尼西亚或在印度尼西亚销售前的强制要求。与CE、FCC、中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可或CCC认证不存在等效认可。每款设备型号均须在SDPPI认可实验室进行测试。所有蜂窝设备还须进行IMEI注册。标签上红框内未显示有效SDPPI认证编号的设备将被DJBC在印度尼西亚海关扣押。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SDPPI型號認證（sertifikasi perangkat）是所有無線及電信設備進口至印度尼西亞或在印度尼西亞銷售前的強制要求。與CE、FCC、中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可或CCC認證不存在等效認可。每款設備型號均須在SDPPI認可實驗室進行測試。所有蜂窩設備還須進行IMEI註冊。標籤上紅框內未顯示有效SDPPI認證編號的設備將被DJBC在印度尼西亞海關扣押。
